# FNLLA UI Support

## Where to start

Before opening an issue, check:

- [`README.md`](../README.md)
- [`SUPPORT.md`](../SUPPORT.md)
- [`TRADEMARKS.md`](../TRADEMARKS.md)
- [`docs/index.html`](../docs/index.html)
- [`docs/api.html`](../docs/api.html)
- [`docs/team-usage-and-maintenance.html`](../docs/team-usage-and-maintenance.html)

## Use the right route

- Bug or regression: open a GitHub bug report.
- Feature proposal: open a GitHub feature request.
- Security vulnerability: follow [`SECURITY.md`](../SECURITY.md) and do not use public issues.
- Trademark or branding question: use [`TRADEMARKS.md`](../TRADEMARKS.md).
- Business, partnership or commercial implementation request: use `https://techayo.co.uk`.
- General repository conduct concern: follow [`CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md`](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).

## Scope reminder

FNLLA UI is public and MIT-licensed, but TechAyo LTD does not promise support, maintenance or a regular release cadence for third-party self-managed projects.

Use [`SUPPORT.md`](../SUPPORT.md) as the source of truth for the support boundary.
